ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* Origin airport code (IATA) */,
  "std" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "atd" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport code (IATA) */,
  "sta" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "delay" REAL /* Delay in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Flight status (e.g., Landed, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Flight duration */,
  "replay" REAL /* Replay (not used) */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time based on current flight status and conditions */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (redundant but useful for quick queries) */,
  "pilot_in_command" TEXT /* Name of the pilot in command */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the flight */,
  "total_cargo_weight" REAL /* Total weight of cargo in kilograms */,
  "weather_conditions_on_departure" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of departure */,
  "weather_conditions_on_arrival" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of arrival */,
  "air_traffic_control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air traffic control tower managing the flight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the flight record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (IATA) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Airport name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the airport record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_registration" TEXT /* Aircraft registration number */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Aircraft type (e.g., Boeing 737) */,
  "aircraft_status" TEXT /* Aircraft status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "aircraft_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the aircraft record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Crew member name */,
  "crew_role" TEXT /* Crew member role (e.g., Pilot, Flight Attendant) */,
  "crew_status" TEXT /* Crew member status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the crew member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member was hired */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the crew member record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_crew" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "crew_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member on the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the crew assignment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the crew assignment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the crew assignment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircraft" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was assigned to the flight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the aircraft assignment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., Weather, Traffic) */,
  "delay_minutes" REAL /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay started */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the delay record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., Landed, Delayed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was updated */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who recorded the status update */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status history record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* User name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Dispatcher, Pilot) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., Flight Tracking, User Actions) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the log record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Departure, Arrival, Delay) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the notification record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
